---
title: "Feedback Summary"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Feedback summary

**Audit:** Procurement Process Audit

**Generated:** 2026-07-05

## Executive view

| Metric | Value |
|---|---:|
| Requests sent | 2 |
| Responses received | 2 |
| Responses not received | 0 |
| Overall average score | 3.44 |

## Response status by recipient

| Name | Role | Email | Request sent | Response status | Received date | Average score | Original response file |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---:|---|
| Chinese Dan | Head of Procurement | c.dan@lsjc.com | Yes | Received (inferred) |  | 4.33 |  |
| Antony Soprano | Head of Accounts Payable | a.soprano@lsjc.com | Yes | Received (inferred) |  | 2.56 |  |

## Results by question

| Question ID | Question | Responses | Average score | Comments |
|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Q01 | The audit objectives, scope, and expected outcome were clear. | 2 | 4.00 |  |
| Q02 | The audit was planned and organized in a way that made the required involvement clear in advance. | 2 | 3.50 |  |
| Q03 | Communication throughout the audit was timely and effective. | 2 | 3.00 | Antony Soprano: I was not informed |
| Q04 | Internal Audit demonstrated a good understanding of our business process, risks, and controls. | 2 | 2.50 | Antony Soprano: Not at all |
| Q05 | Information requests were clear, reasonable, and proportionate to the audit objectives. | 2 | 4.50 |  |
| Q06 | Facts, comments, and your point of view were properly considered when preparing the audit report. | 2 | 4.00 |  |
| Q07 | Audit observations and recommendations were practical, realistic, and likely to improve the process or control environment. | 2 | 3.50 |  |
| Q08 | The audit focused on the areas that mattered most. | 2 | 3.00 | Antony Soprano: No and I told them |
| Q09 | If another audit were performed in our area, you would welcome Internal Audit involvement again. | 2 | 3.00 |  |

## Detailed answers

| Recipient | Response received | Question ID | Question | Score | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Chinese Dan | Yes | Q01 | The audit objectives, scope, and expected outcome were clear. | 5 |  |
| Chinese Dan | Yes | Q02 | The audit was planned and organized in a way that made the required involvement clear in advance. | 4 |  |
| Chinese Dan | Yes | Q03 | Communication throughout the audit was timely and effective. | 4 |  |
| Chinese Dan | Yes | Q04 | Internal Audit demonstrated a good understanding of our business process, risks, and controls. | 4 |  |
| Chinese Dan | Yes | Q05 | Information requests were clear, reasonable, and proportionate to the audit objectives. | 5 |  |
| Chinese Dan | Yes | Q06 | Facts, comments, and your point of view were properly considered when preparing the audit report. | 4 |  |
| Chinese Dan | Yes | Q07 | Audit observations and recommendations were practical, realistic, and likely to improve the process or control environment. | 4 |  |
| Chinese Dan | Yes | Q08 | The audit focused on the areas that mattered most. | 4 |  |
| Chinese Dan | Yes | Q09 | If another audit were performed in our area, you would welcome Internal Audit involvement again. | 5 |  |
| Antony Soprano | Yes | Q01 | The audit objectives, scope, and expected outcome were clear. | 3 |  |
| Antony Soprano | Yes | Q02 | The audit was planned and organized in a way that made the required involvement clear in advance. | 3 |  |
| Antony Soprano | Yes | Q03 | Communication throughout the audit was timely and effective. | 2 | I was not informed |
| Antony Soprano | Yes | Q04 | Internal Audit demonstrated a good understanding of our business process, risks, and controls. | 1 | Not at all |
| Antony Soprano | Yes | Q05 | Information requests were clear, reasonable, and proportionate to the audit objectives. | 4 |  |
| Antony Soprano | Yes | Q06 | Facts, comments, and your point of view were properly considered when preparing the audit report. | 4 |  |
| Antony Soprano | Yes | Q07 | Audit observations and recommendations were practical, realistic, and likely to improve the process or control environment. | 3 |  |
| Antony Soprano | Yes | Q08 | The audit focused on the areas that mattered most. | 2 | No and I told them |
| Antony Soprano | Yes | Q09 | If another audit were performed in our area, you would welcome Internal Audit involvement again. | 1 |  |

## Open feedback


### Chinese Dan


**What was most useful in this audit?**

Timing

**What should Internal Audit improve in future audits?**

Less requests

**Is there anything you expected from this audit but did not receive?**

No


### Antony Soprano


**What was most useful in this audit?**

Nothing



## Requests without response

_All requested responses were received._

## Validation notes

- Chinese Dan: response was treated as received because the template contains entered scores/comments, but `response.received` is still `false`.
- Antony Soprano: response was treated as received because the template contains entered scores/comments, but `response.received` is still `false`.

## Notes for auditor

This summary is generated from YAML response templates in `08_feedback/response/`.

Original replies should be saved in `08_feedback/response/original/` and referenced in `response.original_response_file` inside each response template.
